name: io.github.Haiku-Trading/haiku-mcp-server
title: Haiku DeFi MCP
description: DeFi execution for AI agents — swap, lend, bridge, and yield across 22 chains.

environmentVariables.name: HAIKU_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for higher rate limits (optional — works without)

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key (0x hex) for self-contained execution without an external wallet
